rows.protocol_note: GPT-5.6 Preview System Card dated 2026-06-25. Comparison values use recent model snapshots and may differ from launch values. External SecureBio evaluation; strongest of two pre-release Sol checkpoints or railfree Sol; system-level bio filters disabled.
